brand_vibe: Authentic, rural India warmth, premium organic, hand-crafted, trustworthy, earthy

design_system_rules.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers. Avoid cramped layouts.
design_system_rules.borders_and_shadows: Use 1px border (border-[#E5E0D8]) for cards. Shadows should be warm and diffuse, e.g., shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(44,76,59,0.06)].
design_system_rules.radius: Subtle roundness. rounded-xl or rounded-2xl for images and cards.
design_system_rules.buttons: Rounded-full (pill shape) for primary CTAs. bg-[#2C4C3B] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3629] transition-colors. Include data-testid.
design_system_rules.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay on background to reduce digital flatness and enhance the 'handcrafted' feel.
design_system_rules.logo_concept: Custom SVG text 'SATTHAMMA FARMS' using Cormorant Garamond with a minimalist wheat or sun motif intertwined with the letter S.

3D_and_interactions.hero_3D: Implement React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for the hero section. Create floating, slowly rotating 3D organic elements (wheat, corn, spice jars) using <Float>. Use warm ambientLight and directionalLight.
3D_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-up on product grids. Parallax scrolling for background images or textures.
3D_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Image zoom on hover for product cards. Button scale down on tap (active:scale-95).

Home.Hero: Split layout: Text (H1, overline, CTA) on left, R3F 3D Canvas on right displaying floating harvest items.
Home.About: Warm, earthy section explaining organic farming without harmful chemicals. Image of Indian farmer.
Home.Categories: Bento Grid (tetris mode) showcasing Grains, Spices, Pickles, Pulses. Asymmetrical layout.
Home.Featured_Products: Horizontal scroll or 4-col grid of top products. Handcrafted card style.
Home.Testimonials: Phase 2 placeholder card design. Customer review carousel.
Home.Footer: Large typography, quick links, contact info (email/phone), Instagram/YouTube links.

Catalog.Header: Sticky crystal glass nav with backdrop-blur.
Catalog.Layout: Sidebar for category filters (corn, maize, paddy, etc.), main area for 3-col product grid.
Catalog.Product_Card: Image (70%), Title, Price, Add to Cart button (accent color).

Product_Detail.Layout: 2-column. Left: Image/Video gallery. Right: Title, Price, Description, Add to Cart, Quality Badges (Organic, Handpicked, No Chemicals).

Admin_Dashboard.Layout: Shadcn-based functional dashboard. Sidebar nav. Data tables for orders and customers. Forms for product CRUD with image/video upload. Protected by auth.

testing_and_qa.requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, links, form inputs, and carts MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'add-to-cart-btn', 'admin-login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required font packages: @fontsource/cormorant-garamond and @fontsource/manrope.
Implement the base color palette in tailwind.config.js using exact hex codes.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for earthy, rounded icon vibes.
Install React Three Fiber and Drei (three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei) for the hero section.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs (like via.placeholder). ONLY use the URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure the hero section 3D experience does not block the main CTA or text.
For the admin section, switch to a dense 'Control Room' grid layout using Shadcn components.
Ensure all interactive components have proper ARIA labels and data-testid attributes.
